counters.description: i perma ban rengar every game! his kit comepletly benefits from iverns kit. not only because of the w (bushmaker) creating jump possibilities for rengar. but also his w that cancles iverns q (rootcaller) and also iverns r knock up. also rengar can really abuse iverns early game by cheesing him in iverns own jungle by invading him permanent. in mid/late game a fed rengar can just walk over ivern without consequences!

kayn is a highly mobile assasin jungler that can look for spicy invades where he can oneshot ivern. kayns ability to dash forward or walk into walls making it almost impossible to hit iverns q (rootcaller) or knock up. ontop of that his ultimate can execute ivern almost everytime and at the same time dodge iverns and his teammates damage!

bel veth is a high mobility bruiser that can invade early into the game making it very hard for ivern to scale into the game. she can just walk into iverns jungle and clear it while ivern has to wait for it to get ready for his passive. after a kill/objective she also can jump over walls making it even more easier for her to invade his jungle. her ability to dodge some dmg makes it harder for ivern and his teammates to kill her + it is an execude.
early into the game udyr has a very fast clear that means he can invade easily afterwards!

nidalees ability to jump over walls early into the game turning her into a thread to ivern. her invades almost everytime lead to the death of ivern! bringing him behind and turning him into a minion.....
kindred will always invade after 1-3 camps making it risky to farm ivern own camps.
khazix is a high mobility assasin  that can easily jump on ivern early to late game.
xin zhao can be a hard match up for ivern because of his low cd abilitys and hard cc of knock ups and slows on ivern. even after ivern flashes out in a fight xin can still follow up killing ivern.
graves high dmg output against ivern but also his high mobility of jumping walls early on creating a high thread for ivern not only early into the game but also mid/lategame
talons high dmg/ high mobility and his invisibilty creating the almost perfect champs vs ivern.

synergies.description: i have plenty of games with irelia and i can tell you that this beast of a champion is one of the best you can have on ur team as an ivern! her healing and survivability gets even more broken with support ivern on her side.

aatrox is a very great champion to syndergies with ivern since he can out outlive most burst dmg with his already high healing! ivern helps that with his shields and heals from moonstone turning aatrox into a even more brokener fighter!!!
sylas high engage potential and survivability gets buffed with ivern rootcaller and triggerseed. making teamfights or even 2v2 ivern and sylas favourable.

darius gets a lot of more cc while fighting with ivern. not only will darius w slow enemies but also ivern e (triggerseed) will perma slow enemies!!! the cc output from both together is pretty strong.
camilles ability to hard cc 1 target is great for iverns follow up root q (rootcaller) or knockup by daisy (r). her healing is also greatly increased by iverns items
nautilus is one of the best supports to pick with ivern!!!! heavy cc, alot of tankiness and a long hook turning him into the perfekt set up for ganking botlane as ivern!
jax has a very high mobilty output with his q on lower cd in middle/lategame but also alot of tankiness by his ult etc turning him into a great fighter for ivern.
akali is an okay pick with ivern because of her high dmg output but, but sometimes it gets hard for ivern to follow up all her dashes into the backline
yone is a broken pick on mid or even toplane with ivern!!! the fights with yone are almost perfekt with all the knock ups yone and daisy can creat while also getting alot of shields from both champs!

ekko is a great choice for a midlaner with ivern because of his high dmg / high survivability but his changing of positions mid fight can lead to the death of ivern if both are a bit deep into the fight. also there are better options (e.g sylas,kata )

kalista is a strong pick for ivern!! she wants to fight front to back, she has infinite dashes making it harder for enemies to get on her. but if they somehow manage to get to her u have the perfekt protection from ivern and daisy + her own ult!

vayne is not only good on botlane with ivern but also very strong topside champ!!! her ability to go invis and  dodging ability/attacks turning her into a teamfight mashine but also a great 2v2 pick. he survivability gets buffed with ivern shields and his slows are perfect to catch up to enemies
ezreal is strong mid/late game. exactly when ivern shines aswell turning teamfights into an easy task for both champs.
her ability to oneshot enmies but also outlive enemies combos by going invis afterwards are great for ivern+qiyana combos. after her full combo ivern can protect her an seek more kills.
cassiopeia is a great choice of champion with ivern. her damage output is great but also her healing is good for teamfights esp with ivern combo.
fiora+ivern feels like putting icing on the cake. fiora healing gets not only doubled by ivern but also his shield turn her into a monster that cant be killed!
late game kassadin is very strong and can get alot of buffs from ivern, but his permanent chaning of positiones makes it hard for a follow up as ivern :s

his ability to stand behind and kill the enemies with his soldier make him great of teamfight with ivern. iverns items(staff of the flowing water/ardent censer) synergies very very well with azir. also azir can protect ivern from hard engage by using his ult.
i have plenty of games with irelia and i can tell you that this beast of a champion is one of the best you can have on ur team as an ivern!
